# Request for Proposals — ERP Upgrade for Regional Retail Chain

**Reference:** RET-AFR-ERP-2026-07  
**Client:** Southern Retail Holdings Ltd.  
**Country of performance:** **Republic of South Africa** (Johannesburg HQ + Cape Town distribution centre)  
**Deadline:** 2026-05-15  

## Background

Southern Retail Holdings operates grocery and pharmacy outlets across four provinces. The company seeks an implementation partner to migrate legacy inventory and POS systems to a cloud ERP platform.

## Workstreams

- Requirements workshops with IT and finance teams  
- Data migration from on-premise SQL servers  
- Hypercare support for 90 days post go-live  

## Eligibility

The client will contract **only with vendors already certified by SAP as Silver Partners** headquartered in **South Africa**. **International subsidiaries without a South African legal entity cannot bid.** Subcontracting above 15% of contract value requires written approval.

## Value & duration

Estimated ZAR 18–22 million over 14 months.
